title: Campaigns & Issues - Chris Evans MP
text_excerpt: Campaigns & Issues - Chris Evans MP Chris Evans MP About Parliament Archives & History Campaigns & Issues Help & Advice Useful Info Blog Archive Contact Chris Evans MP About Parliament Archives & History Campaigns & Issues Help & Advice Useful Info Blog Archive Contact Chris Evans MP MEMBER OF PARLIAMENT FOR CAERPHILLY Get in touch 9 Campaigns and Issues As your Member of Parliament, I am involved in a number of campaigns and causes ranging from apprenticeships to pensions and much more. Please find below a list of campaigns I am currently supporting and my position on various issues. If you would like to know my position on any issue or ask me to support any cause not listed here, please get in touch. Causes and Charities As your MP, I have supported the work and campaigns of a wide range of national and local charities. You can find some examples of causes and charities I have helped with below. Cancer Research Wales Contact a Family Disability Can-Do MND Association Tenovus Cancer Care Women Against State Pension Inequality (WASPI) Beat eating disorders Get in Contact with Chris Evans Contact Us 9 Privacy Policy Office Standards Get in Touch  chris.evans.mp@parliament.uk  01495 231 990 Visit  6A Woodfieldside Business Park Penmaen Road Pontllanfraith NP12 2DG Follow Me Follow Follow Website by Highstreet Media Pay Monthly Websites
